entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop species Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br. being studied for yield and fodder traits

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: The number of days required for 50% of the crop to reach the flowering stage

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical measurement of the plant

entities.name: PANICLE GIRTH
entities.description: The thickness or width of the panicle

entities.name: BLAST SEVERITY SCORE
entities.description: A measure of the severity of blast disease infection

entities.name: PANICLE YIELD
entities.description: The amount of yield produced per panicle

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The total weight of grains produced per unit area

entities.name: DRY FODDER YIELD
entities.description: The total weight of dry fodder produced per unit area

entities.name: THRESHING PERCENTAGE
entities.description: The percentage of grain successfully separated from the straw

entities.name: BIOMASS PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total biological mass produced by the plant

entities.name: LINE X TESTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: A breeding design used to evaluate the combining ability of parents to produce superior hybrids

entities.name: ALPHA-LATTICE DESIGN
entities.description: An experimental design used to evaluate hybrids across different locations

entities.name: PEDIGREE BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding method used to improve traits through selection and record-keeping of ancestry

entities.name: RAINFED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions where crop water requirements are met solely by precipitation

entities.name: COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The capacity of parents to transmit favorable traits to their offspring

entities.name: GENERAL COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The average performance of a parent in a series of crosses

entities.name: SPECIFIC COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The performance of a specific hybrid cross that deviates from the expected value based on the general combining ability of the parents

entities.name: HETEROSIS
entities.description: The phenomenon where hybrid offspring exhibit superior traits compared to their parents

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENE ACTION
entities.description: The cumulative effect of alleles at different loci contributing to a trait

entities.name: NON-ADDITIVE GENE ACTION
entities.description: The effect of dominance or epistasis contributing to a trait
